extra.reason: Migrated to Biome 2.5. Added biome.json (Prettier-matched: 2-space, double quotes, semicolons), replaced lint/prettier scripts with biome check / biome check --write, removed eslint-config-next + prettier + their configs. Disabled noFallthroughSwitchClause (intentional per CLAUDE.md), noExplicitAny + noNonNullAssertion (pervasive intentional). Fixed real findings: type=button on 10 buttons, Map->MapIcon alias, removed unused lodash reverse, node: protocol/radix/Number.isNaN autofixes. Excluded *.css (Biome can't parse Tailwind v4 @theme). Verified: biome check exit 0 (4 advisory warnings), 106 tests pass, production build succeeds.
